arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola risks repeating Cole Palmer mistake as Man City youngster eyed for big transfer
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has already suggested that stuttering champions Manchester City could dip into the transfer market this January but sales could also be on the agenda for the side

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer latest amid major Randal Kolo Muani update as Blues' January plans revealed
arts.sum: While the club are long-term admirers of the 21-year-old striker, who has been excellent for the Tractor Boys in their first season back in the Premier League in more than 20 years, a move next month is deemed very unlikely at this stage. Chelsea are not planning to make a move for Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani in next month's mid-season transfer window, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target blockbuster moves for Premier League duo
arts.sum: Chelsea are interested in Bournemouth duo Dean Huijsen and Ilya Zabarnyi, according to a report. Centre-backs Dean Huijsen and Ilya Zabarnyi, too, are becoming increasingly sought-after commodities.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'make transfer decision' on £78.7m striker as Enzo Maresca's January plan revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly decide whether to press ahead with a deal for Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: £50m Chelsea star 'included in Enzo Maresca’s plan' to offload five players in January
arts.sum: "There are players that unfortunately didn't play a lot with us in all the competitions like Chilwell, like Carney [Chukwuemeka]," Maresca said. Chelsea are reportedly getting ready to offload a number of fringe players as Enzo Maresca looks to refine his title-challenging squad.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola comment on Chelsea star speaks volumes as five players put up for grabs
arts.sum: With Enzo Maresca hinting at a January clear-out at Stamford Bridge, Pep Guardiola's comments towards one of the Chelsea misfits have re-surfaced

arts.ttl: Chelsea eye two Premier League stars after putting five players up for January sale
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's squad could be boosted by a new centre forward in the January transfer window but the emphasis on Stamford Bridge remains on selling fringe players

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca could welcome back key Chelsea star for Ipswich Town clash after 'technical decision'
arts.sum: Despite his previous positive performances, the England international was not included in Maresca's 20-man squad that lost to Fulham on Boxing Day. "It's just a technical decision," Maresca said regarding the dropping of Madueke.

arts.ttl: Chelsea should offer £52m player Enzo Maresca loves in swap deal for Randal Kolo Muani - opinion
Jude Bellingham spotted with Chelsea pair Noni Madueke and Jadon Sancho on Christmas break
arts.sum: England and Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has enjoyed a busy winter break over Christmas, including catching up with Chelsea stars Jadon Sancho and Noni Madueke . Sancho has started Chelsea's last four league games, while Madueke was left out of Maresca's side for their last outing against Fulham.
